generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorMountedEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor-mounted position encoder on the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor of the MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxSecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary gearbox position encoder on the gearwheel gearbox of the MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor stator current I_M of the first axis motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance AngleMeasurementSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Derived angle measurement (output angle) of the first axis, published as a sensor stream"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AngleMeasurementDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorMountedEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxSecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance AngleMeasurementDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AngleMeasurementSensor
]

// C10: Data
instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw motor position r_M from the motor‑mounted encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]

instance GearboxEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox output position r_G from the secondary gearbox encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current I_M"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]

instance AngleMeasurementData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured output angle r_out of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngleMeasurementDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated torque derived from motor current and friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DerivedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated angular velocity from position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DerivedAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated angular acceleration from velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance FrictionParametersData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Identified static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters (Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

// C10: Models
instance AxisSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition and internal block diagrams of the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance MotorSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor including friction modelling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearboxSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the gearwheel gearbox for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance CycloidalGearboxSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the cycloidal gearbox for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance FrictionCompositeModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Composite friction model (Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) used in simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DataCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data‑calculation model for deriving torque, velocity and acceleration from sensor traces"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for live streaming of sensor data to the digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlModelUpdateService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink execution environment for simulation and friction parameter identification"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterIdentificationService
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tooling for structural and behavioral engineering models"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell representation of robot components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom dashboard for real‑time visualization of robot state and friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides a real‑time visualization dashboard of robot state and identified friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardFrictionInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Identifies static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters by comparing simulated and measured data"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight, AdjustTorqueCommandAction
]

instance ControlModelUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automatically updates the robot control model with derived friction parameters to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyInsight, UpdateRobotControlModelAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance DashboardFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard presents identified friction parameters to operators for decision support"
]

instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derived friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) identified from sensor and simulation data"
]

instance MotionAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Improved positional accuracy achieved by adjusting torque commands using derived friction parameters"
]

// C17: Actions
instance AdjustTorqueCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust torque commands in the robot control algorithms based on derived friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance UpdateRobotControlModelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update of the robot control model with new friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time synchronization with the robot’s operating cycle; data are captured and streamed online as the robot moves (no explicit sample rate given)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A purpose‑driven digital shadow comprising a Purpose element (FrictionDerivation), an Asset element (MABI robot first axis), Sources (sensor channels), Processing components (Simulation M, GW, GB) that consume input traces and produce simulated traces, Models (engineering, simulation, data‑calculation), and a Dashboard for user interaction."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is created and used during the operational stage of the robot, supporting online model refinement while the robot is in service."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Full traceability of each data point to its source and processing component, enabling verification by comparing simulated friction‑less data with measured traces; the processing component records provenance to ensure model validity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted from the physical robot to the digital shadow using the MQTT protocol."
]
